case_title: BLADIMIR QUINTANILLA VS. MARGARITA ALVAREA ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-08-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, MARGARITA HEARING SET FOR APR-08-2021 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PLAINTIFF BLADIMIR QUINTANILLA IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER GUSTAVO NARANJO. DEFENDANTS MARGARITA ALVAREZ, RICARDO PADILLA, ROSIBEL HENRIQUEZ IS PRESENT ALL ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER. PIEDAD BLANCO. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUINTANILLA, BLADIMIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, MARGARITA PADILLA, RICARDO HENRIQUEZ, ROSIBEL ABIGAIL $5,050.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00, ROSIBEL HENRIQUEZ HERNANDEZ AND RICARDO PADILLA ARE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FROM ACTION. SEE ENCLOSED ATTACHMENT: STATEMENT OF DECISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
